issues.title: Card type "wild" never played
issues.description: The "wild" card type was never used during this playthrough. This may indicate the card type is unavailable, underpowered, or the player's deck/archetype doesn't include it.

issues.title: Lethal damage spike on floor 2 enc 1 turn 15
issues.description: Enemy dealt 31 damage when player had 17 HP (182.4% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: floor 2 enc 0 took 12 turns (prev avg: 5.7)
issues.description: Encounter against crystal_guardian took 4 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 1.7 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3 (early game). Defeated by crystal_golem (common) with accuracy 55.6%.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: floor 5 enc 1 took 7 turns (prev avg: 2.0)
issues.description: Encounter against crystal_warden took 10 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.0 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters starting floor 1
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP (>72/80) across 5 consecutive encounters (floors 1-2). HP values: 80, 80, 80, 80, 78.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Observe lack of meaningful HP pressure

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 9 encounter 2
issues.description: Encounter against crystal_warden took 10 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 200, profile speed-runner

issues.title: Unfun HP swing in floor 1 encounter 1
issues.description: Player HP dropped from 73 (>56=70% of 80) to 0 (<16=20% of 80) within a single encounter. This kind of swing feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Zero damage dealt in floor 2 encounter 2 (ember_drake)
issues.description: The player dealt 0 damage during floor 2, encounter 2 against ember_drake. The player had no way to damage the enemy, resulting in a dead end. Player was defeated.

issues.title: Lethal damage spike on floor 7 enc 2 turn 3
issues.description: Enemy dealt 12 damage when player had 12 HP (100.0% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.

issues.title: Damage spike on floor 10 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 15 damage when player had 15 HP (100.0% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 200, profile speed-runner

issues.title: Floor 15 enc 2: 19 turns vs prev floor avg 7.0
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 15 took 19 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 7.0 turns. This indicates a difficulty spike.

issues.title: Damage spike on floor 6 enc 2 turn 6
issues.description: Enemy dealt 12 damage (>5 = 50% of 10 HP) in a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Insufficient healing after floor 3
issues.description: Player's maximum HP after floor 3 was 47, never reaching the 60% threshold of 48. This suggests healing mechanics are insufficient for sustain in mid-to-late game.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Monitor HP recovery throughout remaining floors

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 11 encounter 0
issues.description: Encounter against crystal_warden took 12 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 5.3 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 500, profile speed-runner

issues.title: Player never exceeded 60% HP after floor 3 (max: 44)
issues.description: After floor 3, the player's HP never exceeded 44 (threshold: 48, which is 60% of 80 max HP). This suggests healing mechanics are insufficient to sustain the player in later floors.
reproductionSteps: Floors 4+: check healing card availability and heal amounts

issues.title: Damage spike on floor 13 encounter 1
issues.description: Enemy dealt 7 damage when player had 4 HP (175.0% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 500, profile speed-runner

issues.title: HP dropped from 62 to 14 in floor 9 encounter 0
issues.description: Player HP went from 62 (>56) to 14 (<16) within a single encounter on floor 9. This dramatic HP swing can feel unfair and unfun.
